name: preelly
description: Preelly marketplace platform — api, front, and admin monorepo

scripts.dev:all: npm run dev:api & sleep 2 && npm run dev:front
scripts.dev:full: npm run dev:api & sleep 2 && npm run dev:front & npm run dev:admin
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=front && npm run build --workspace=admin
scripts.build:prod: npm run build --workspace=front && npm run build --workspace=admin
